code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut done = false

  while i < parts.len() and not done
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end

    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end

    if total + n > 100
      done = true
    else
      total = total + n
      i = i + 1
    end
  end

  print("total=#{total}")
  Ok(())
end
